summary: M5-MULTIYEAR-AI-RUN-001 is CLOSED only after PR #116 passed CI, merged into main, local main synchronized to origin/main, and active child threads were closed. The integrated branch adds deterministic M5 multi-year AI run validation, a workspace-local @monsoon/sim-ai package, a headless runner, focused tests, and audit evidence. The explicit live no-action-only limitation remains recorded for later M5 gate evidence.
